name: Improper Handling of Values
description: The product does not properly handle cases where the expected number of values for parameters, fields, or arguments differs from what is provided — values may be missing, extra, or undefined. This can lead to unexpected application state or integrity violations.
detection_pattern: Look for INGRESS nodes (request parameters, form fields, API arguments) flowing to CONTROL or TRANSFORM nodes (business logic, data processing) without a TRANSFORM mediator (value count validation, missing/extra value checks) that ensures the expected number and presence of values before processing.
